description_long: This object is a rectangular cardboard box with a bright orange color and bold white and black text on the front reading 'BONETI BIZCOCHUELO DE ZANAHORIA.' The front features an image of a round, orange cake dusted with powdered sugar, sliced and presented on a plate. The back of the box displays preparation instructions, ingredients, and a cupcake option, all set against a background with subtle apricot or carrot illustrations. The sides of the box provide nutritional information, organic product labeling, and eco-packaging details. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with a focus on natural and vegan-friendly messaging. The box is sealed and appears to be a commercial food product, likely containing a cake or baking mix.
description: A bright orange rectangular box with bold branding and an image of a sliced cake on the front, featuring detailed instructions and organic labeling on the back and sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'BONETI' branding, a photo of a sliced cake, and product details in large, bold text.
description_view_1: The left side view displays nutritional information, organic product labeling, and a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_2: The back view features preparation instructions, ingredients, a vegan option badge, and a cupcake illustration.
description_view_3: The right side view provides instructions for a cheese cream topping, eco-packaging information, and a slogan at the top.
